breakdown: Refactoring PR that moves level-up and rewards logic from game_state to a dedicated rewards_engine module, following single-responsibility principles. The diff shows clean import reorganization with descriptive function names like ensure_rewards_box, normalize_rewards_box, is_level_up_active. Tests were updated to reflect module changes. Most actual implementation code not visible in truncated diff, limiting full assessment of error handling and type safety.
key_changes: Functions _is_state_flag_false/_is_state_flag_true moved from game_state to rewards_engine
New functions added to rewards_engine: ensure_rewards_box, normalize_rewards_box, is_level_up_active, project_level_up_ui
world_logic.py imports updated to use rewards_engine module instead of game_state
Test updates to session_header_utils with proper imports
Startup import regression tests updated to target llm_parser instead of streaming_orchestrator
